title: About Us
subtitle: Catering to your requirements, handling your needs with care

story.p1: Arome et Delices and Arome Gourmet is a family-owned company with an operated coffee business — marketing and selling premium single-origin green coffee, and recently offering roasted and ground coffee, exclusively to its coffee customers and connoisseurs throughout the Middle East and some European countries.
story.p2: Our primary goal is to bring our coffee lovers the world's finest green coffee, grown in the Asian and African mountains as well as in Central and South America — sold raw to the most famous coffee roasteries, or blended and roasted at our own roasting plant.

process.title: How we roast
process.intro: Being a family roaster allows us the luxury of focusing on quality control at every step of the roasting process.

steps.title: Only the highest-quality beans
steps.body: Only the highest quality beans are considered — and only the best of these will ever make it to the consumer.

steps.title: Roasted in small batches
steps.body: All our coffee is roasted in small batches, giving us full control over body, aroma and flavor.

steps.title: Blended with intent
steps.body: Single origins are blended in a technique that optimizes body, aroma and flavors — creating a new taste and a cup superior to each single origin used alone.

steps.title: A memorable cup
steps.body: The aroma of a freshly roasted blend, with hints of earthiness and sweet undertones — Ethiopian, Asian, Central and Latin American — is sure to make you unwind and enjoy.

cta.title: Let's talk coffee
cta.body: From raw green beans to signature blends — tell us what your roastery or your cup needs.
